nasb.text: As for your male and female slaves whom you may have—you may acquire male and female slaves from the pagan nations that are around you.

esv.text: As for your male and female slaves whom you may have: you may buy male and female slaves from among the nations that are around you.

cnv.text: 至於你需要的僕婢，可以來自你們四圍的列國，你們可以從他們中間購買奴婢。

ccb.text: 你们可以从邻国购买奴隶，
